steps.label: (H⊗I)|00> = |+>|0>
steps.K_change_note: State changed: fidelity = 0.5000 < 1 (states are different). BUT K(psi_new | psi_old, H⊗I) = 0 because psi_new is computable deterministically from psi_old and H⊗I. No new information created.

steps.label: Bell state: (|00>+|11>)/sqrt(2)
steps.K_change_note: State changed: fidelity = 0.2500 < 1. Entanglement created. BUT K(Bell | |+>|0>, CNOT) = 0. The Bell state is EXACTLY determined by the previous state and the gate. Entanglement is not K-change.

steps.label: (T⊗I) Bell state
steps.K_change_note: Phase rotation applied. Fidelity = 0.8536. State is observationally indistinguishable from Bell state in the computational basis (same probabilities), but differs in phase. K(new | old, T⊗I) = 0 still — it is deterministic.

summary.conclusion: Across 3 unitary steps, the quantum state rotated substantially (fidelities: [0.5, 0.25, 0.8536]). Yet K-change = 0 at every step. Unitary evolution is: (1) deterministic, (2) reversible, (3) information-preserving. These three properties force K-change = 0. The Schrodinger equation generates S-information change (the wave function rotates) but ZERO K-information change (the new state is fully compressed as 'apply U to psi_old').

measurement_cases.label: maximally_mixed
measurement_cases.note: |psi> = 0.7071|0> + 0.7071|1>. Measuring: K-change = 1.0000 bits if |0>, 1.0000 bits if |1>. Expected = H = 1.0000 bits. Landauer cost (expected) = 2.9667e-21 J at T=310.0K.

measurement_cases.label: slightly_biased
measurement_cases.note: |psi> = 0.8367|0> + 0.5477|1>. Measuring: K-change = 0.5146 bits if |0>, 1.7370 bits if |1>. Expected = H = 0.8813 bits. Landauer cost (expected) = 2.6145e-21 J at T=310.0K.

measurement_cases.label: strongly_biased
measurement_cases.note: |psi> = 0.9487|0> + 0.3162|1>. Measuring: K-change = 0.1520 bits if |0>, 3.3219 bits if |1>. Expected = H = 0.4690 bits. Landauer cost (expected) = 1.3914e-21 J at T=310.0K.

measurement_cases.label: nearly_classical
measurement_cases.note: |psi> = 0.9950|0> + 0.1000|1>. Measuring: K-change = 0.0145 bits if |0>, 6.6439 bits if |1>. Expected = H = 0.0808 bits. Landauer cost (expected) = 2.3969e-22 J at T=310.0K.

measurement_cases.label: pure_0
measurement_cases.note: |psi> = 1.0000|0> + 0.0000|1>. Measuring: K-change = 0.0000 bits if |0>, 33.2193 bits if |1>. Expected = H = 0.0000 bits. Landauer cost (expected) = 1.0283e-29 J at T=310.0K.

measurement_cases.label: pure_1
measurement_cases.note: |psi> = 0.0000|0> + 1.0000|1>. Measuring: K-change = 33.2193 bits if |0>, 0.0000 bits if |1>. Expected = H = 0.0000 bits. Landauer cost (expected) = 1.0283e-29 J at T=310.0K.

measurement_cases.label: symmetric_30_70
measurement_cases.note: |psi> = 0.5477|0> + 0.8367|1>. Measuring: K-change = 1.7370 bits if |0>, 0.5146 bits if |1>. Expected = H = 0.8813 bits. Landauer cost (expected) = 2.6145e-21 J at T=310.0K.

measurement_cases.label: symmetric_25_75
measurement_cases.note: |psi> = 0.5000|0> + 0.8660|1>. Measuring: K-change = 2.0000 bits if |0>, 0.4150 bits if |1>. Expected = H = 0.8113 bits. Landauer cost (expected) = 2.4068e-21 J at T=310.0K.

maximally_superposed_qubit.label: maximally_superposed_qubit
maximally_superposed_qubit.note: Max superposition: H = 1 bit. Unitary rotation: K-change = 0 bits (free). Measurement: K-change = 1 bit. Landauer floor = 2.9667e-21 J = 1.8517e-02 eV at T=310.0K.

brain_decoherence_budget.note: Estimated 1.00e+12 decoherence events/s in brain. Each costs >= 2.9667e-21 J (Landauer at T=310.0K). Total minimum power = 2.9667e-09 W = 2.9667e+00 nW. Actual brain power = 20.0 W. Ratio = 6.7415e+09 (6.742 billion × Landauer floor). Per action potential: Landauer = 2.9667e-21 J, actual = 2.0000e-12 J, ratio = 6.7415e+08.

S_vs_K_distinction.note: S-dynamics (Schrodinger) runs at ~1e+14 Hz for molecular systems. K-updates (measurement/decoherence) run at ~1e+03 Hz (neural timescale). S-to-K timescale ratio: 1e+11× — S is 1e+11× faster than K. S-bit rate for 2-qubit system: 5.12e+16 bits/s. K-bit rate from measurements: 1.00e+03 bits/s. K/S rate ratio: 1.95e-14. Phenomenal flow tracks K-updates (decoherence), not S-rotations.

bell_state_measurement.note: Bell state full measurement: K = 1.0 bit total (entanglement shares 1 bit). Two independent qubits: K = 2.0 bits total. Mutual information I(q0;q1) = 1.0 bit — entanglement 'pre-compresses' the measurement outcome by exactly I. Landauer cost: Bell = 2.9667e-21 J, independent = 5.9334e-21 J.
